tasks.label: 🚀 Publicar site na internet
tasks.detail: Sobe as alterações para o ar (Vercel). Atalho: Cmd+Shift+B
tasks.command: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; export PATH="$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v24.18.0/bin:$PATH"; echo 'Publicando... aguarde 10-40s.'; vercel deploy --prod --yes && echo '' && echo '✅ No ar em https://bachtold-educacao.vercel.app'
